title: galium fruticosum var. rupicola
intro: Galium fruticosum var. rupicola, also known as Rock Bedstraw, is a subspecies of the Galium fruticosum plant, a low-growing, flowering herbaceous perennial found in mountainous regions. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, making it useful in treating wounds, cuts, and skin irritations. The health benefits of Rock Bedstraw include its ability to reduce inflammation and promote tissue repair, as well as its use as a diuretic to treat urinary issues and improve kidney function. Rock Bedstraw can be prepared as an herbal tea, tincture, or topical cream, allowing for various applications in traditional medicine and natural healing practices.
